sentences.arabic: الصَّلَاةُ هِيَ الرُّكْنُ الثَّانِي مِنْ أَرْكَانِ الْإِسْلَامِ.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer is the second pillar of Islam.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ إِنَّ الصَّلَوَاتِ الْخَمْسَ تَمْحُو الذُّنُوبَ كَمَا يَغْسِلُ الْمَاءُ الْوَسَخَ [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ مَوَاقِيتِ الصَّلَاةِ، حَدِيثُ ٥٢٨].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, je rekao da pet dnevnih namaza brišu grijehe kao što voda spira prljavštinu [Buhari].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) said that the five daily prayers erase sins just as water washes away dirt [Bukhari].

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ يُحَافِظُ عَلَى صَلَاتِهِ فِي أَوْقَاتِهَا الْمُحَدَّدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Musliman čuva svoj namaz u njegovim određenim vremenima.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim maintains his prayer at its specified times.

sentences.translation: Namaz daruje srcu odmor i smirenost.
sentences.translationEn: Prayer grants the heart rest and tranquility.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ صِلَةٌ مُبَاشِرَةٌ بَيْنَ الْعَبْدِ وَرَبِّهِ.
sentences.translation: On je direktna veza između roba i njegovog Gospodara.
sentences.translationEn: It is a direct connection between the servant and his Lord.
